description_long: This object is a set of four swords with distinctive, modern-fantasy styling. Each sword features a long, straight blade with a deep green, semi-translucent finish and white grid-like markings, as well as large circular cutouts and notches along the blade's edge. The handles are robust and cylindrical, made of a dark, wood-like material with metallic accents, and each is fitted with a prominent knuckle guard. The pommels are rounded and appear reinforced, while the guards are circular and substantial, providing hand protection. The blades vary in length, with the shortest sword having additional metallic protrusions near the guard, possibly for decorative or functional purposes. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional sword elements with futuristic or stylized features, making them visually striking and suitable for display or ceremonial use.
description: A set of four stylized swords with green, notched blades, circular cutouts, and robust dark handles with knuckle guards and metallic accents.
description_view_0: A top-down view showing the alignment of the four swords, highlighting the circular guards and the symmetry of the handles.
description_view_1: A side view displaying the full length and profile of each blade, including the notches, cutouts, and the unique guard and pommel designs.
description_view_2: A direct front view emphasizing the straightness of the blades, the grid-like markings, and the uniformity of the handles and guards.
description_view_3: A mirrored side view similar to view 1, showing the opposite profile of the swords and the details of the knuckle guards and blade notches.
attribute_blade_type: straight, single-edged, notched, with circular cutouts
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, dark wood-like, with metallic accents and prominent knuckle guard
attribute_ornamentation: white grid-like markings and circular cutouts on the blade
